title: From Marqa-e-Haq to Marqa-e-Taraqqi
content:
Marqa-e-Haq was a defining moment in Pakistan’s journey. It was a moment when Pakistan affirmed its sovereignty with clarity, courage and dignity. One year later, Pakistan stands not only as a nation that defended its sovereignty, but also as a country actively committed to building peace in the region and beyond.

In the face of the Iran-US-Israel conflict and rising tensions across the Middle East, Pakistan has acted as a responsible voice of restraint, dialogue and de-escalation. Through acti

title: Pentagon chief rejects senator’s warning over dwindling US munitions
content:
US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has denied claims by Democratic Senator Mark Kelly, a retired Navy captain, who said US munitions have been “depleted” by the war on Iran.

“‘Captain’ Mark Kelly strikes again,” Hegseth wrote on X.

“Now he’s blabbing on TV (falsely and dumbly) about a *CLASSIFIED* Pentagon briefing he received.”
